category_sources: source_facts.description says it reads MySQL binlogs and writes row updates as JSON to Kafka; official docs describe running Maxwell with MySQL producers.
display_name_sources: Official documentation header uses "Maxwell's Daemon"; source_facts.name is maxwell.
docs_sources: Official maxwells-daemon.io documentation provides Quick Start and Reference pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/zendesk/maxwell; per instructions repo is returned as null when already supplied.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions MySQL binlogs, JSON, and Kafka; official Quick Start includes MySQL configuration and producers.
